creator: sf@maxempire.com
text:
Created attachment 207219
Update of the port to the version 6.1.1

Attached is a SVN diff that updates the security/clamav-unofficial-sigs port to the version 6.1.1

This update has been tested automatically by poudriere. I also did a brief manual functionality check.

With this update, I would also like to drop maintainership of security/clamav-unofficial-sigs port. I'm no longer using this script and can't devote any of my time for looking after it anymore. I would like to thank all FreeBSD committers that have been applying my submissions so far and to everyone else who submitted a patch for the port in the past.

Regards,
Marko Njezic
